title: NFT-fi on Hyperliquid with @hypurrblades
summary_title: HyperBlades building NFT lending, launchpad, and play-to-earn game on Hyperliquid
summary_description: Inside look at HyperBlades' full NFT ecosystem launching on Hyperliquid: lending protocol, raffle-based launchpad, marketplace, and mystery game.

key_moments.label: Zerk introduces HyperBlades team and their Hyperliquid NFT-fi focus
Frank explains successful testnet mint with 10k contract requests and upcoming launchpad
Deep dive into Lendify lending protocol: how borrowers and lenders benefit
Raffle-based launchpad system explained with refundable tickets and anti-bot mechanics
Timeline revealed: testnet in 2 days, mainnet in less than 2 weeks
Team composition: 3 full-time devs, UI/UX designer, game designer, and Frank managing operations
Game teaser: imposter-type play-to-earn game coming with other utilities
Closing remarks on mainnet mint next week and lending protocol in two weeks
